dark:text-zinc-100","children":[["$","script",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"\n(function () {\n  try {\n    var raw = localStorage.getItem('matt-theme-store');\n    if (!raw) {\n      document.documentElement.classList.add('dark');\n      return;\n    }\n    var data = JSON.parse(raw);\n    var t = data && data.state ? data.state.theme : null;\n    if (t === 'light') document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');\n    else document.documentElement.classList.add('dark');\n  } catch (e) {\n    document.documentElement.classList.add('dark');\n  }\n})();\n"}}],["$","$L7",null,{}],["$","div",null,{"className":"min-h-0 min-w-0
